tests.prompt: Backtest a long-only EMA crossover strategy on RELIANCE (NSE) on a 1-day timeframe from 1 January 2025 to 1 January 2026. Entry: Go LONG when EMA(20) crosses above EMA(50) on the daily close. Exit: Stop loss at 1.5% below entry. Take profit at 4.5% above entry. Position sizing: Buy 50 shares per trade. Fees 5 bps, slippage 3 bps.

tests.prompt: Backtest a long-only RSI mean-reversion strategy on HDFCBANK (NSE) on a 1-day timeframe from 1 January 2025 to 1 January 2026. Entry: Go LONG when RSI(14) crosses above 30, AND the closing price is above SMA(200). Exit: Stop loss at 2% below entry. Take profit at 6% above entry. Position sizing: Buy 50 shares per trade. Fees 5 bps, slippage 3 bps.
logs: Backtest report card detected after batch settle

tests.prompt: Backtest a long-only Bollinger Band reversion strategy on INFY (NSE) on a 1-day timeframe from 1 January 2025 to 1 January 2026. Entry: Go LONG when the daily closing price crosses above the lower Bollinger Band (20-period, 2 standard deviations), AND RSI(14) is below 40. Exit: Stop loss at 2% below entry. Take profit at 5% above entry. Position sizing: Buy 50 shares per trade. Fees 5 bps, slippage 3 bps.
logs: Backtest report card detected after batch settle

tests.prompt: Backtest a long-only MACD momentum strategy on TCS (NSE) on a 1-day timeframe from 1 January 2025 to 1 January 2026. Position sizing: Buy 50 shares per trade. Fees 5 bps, slippage 3 bps.

tests.prompt: Backtest a long-only trend-following strategy on WIPRO (NSE) on a 1-day timeframe from 1 January 2025 to 1 January 2026. tests.prompt: Backtest a long-only Stochastic crossover strategy on BAJFINANCE (NSE) on a 1-day timeframe from 1 January 2025 to 1 January 2026.
